com.burningcode.jira.plugin
Class WatcherFieldSettings

java.lang.Object
  webwork.action.ActionSupport

              com.burningcode.jira.plugin.WatcherFieldSettings
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.atlassian.jira.util.ErrorCollection, com.atlassian.jira.util.I18nHelper, com.atlassian.jira.web.util.AuthorizationSupport, Serializable, webwork.action.Action, webwork.action.CommandDriven, webwork.action.IllegalArgumentAware
public class WatcherFieldSettings
extends com.atlassian.jira.web.action.JiraWebActionSupport

Used to handle settings for the JIRA Watcher Field.

Author:
Ray
